{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324100140CA44BD72FF382231B196"}"},"total":256},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618658136622531353","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，男主难得的清醒，写的很通透。一个衰小孩获得力量后没有俗套的唯我独尊戏路，人物刻画的很细腻。有一股子明妃没那么衰的感觉，真的让人梦回高中时期。目前看来没什么毒点，唯一美中不足的地方就是没有与之匹配的配角或者说帮手，希望情感部分可以慢慢来。看过没看过龙族的都给我看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773865108,"group_id":"7603358231200533528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7YU7BT5j/flKuzdJ5ql7PDgCkU0MGUdpGLuK9BAhY4A","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0bd9d20abf2c47688215a5d72141ca4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879073&x-signature=w3%2FT3YiaAZa4GlxaYtucO7a0W%2Fg%3D","user_id":"4459215577948413","user_name":"蛇蛇was"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4459215577948413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603358231200533528","book_info":{"abstract":"【异能+日常+青春幻想+无系统+慢热+迪化】
父亲再婚，莫名其妙和学年第一美少女，成为同住一个屋檐下的兄妹。
作为班级中的吊车尾，高考失利后却被国家学院录取，被认为最具有天赋的调查员。
在被班花女友甩掉之后......
女友：“我们分手吧。”
直升飞机停在高楼之上。
“路名，别耽误时间了，我们该执行任务了。”
满足青春期男生所有幻想，有房有妹，莫名成为实力强大的调查员，装杯打脸。
路名表示，我的日常罢了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o01c27c9a208587d193d6341e4631c233~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"会吃饭的悟空","author_id":"","book_id":"7603358231200533528","book_name":"我的日常罢了，有什么好惊讶的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603358290348605976","read_count":"123010","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"189299"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"92","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o01c27c9a208587d193d6341e4631c233~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779501700&x-signature=1%2FdWC%2BLZP1qWxoEpXqSj1xFMmM4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3032904293680027","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"113"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324100140CA44BD72FF382231B196"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9932,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2226},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"co
